title: crepis vesicaria subsp. hyemalis
intro: Crepis vesicaria subsp. hyemalis, also known as winter cress or cold water cress, is a subspecies of the plant Crepis vesicaria, belonging to the dandelion family. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and diuretic effects, which can help to alleviate symptoms of arthritis and other inflammatory conditions. The health benefits of Crepis vesicaria subsp. hyemalis include reducing blood pressure, improving digestion, and acting as an antioxidant to protect against cell damage. Herbal preparations of this plant can be made by infusing the leaves in hot water or using them in salves and topical creams, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety.
